scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=server" "npm run dev --workspace=client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=server && npm run typecheck --workspace=client
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:e2e --workspace=client
